name: Buttery Lemon-Herb-Rubbed Roast Chicken
description: From The Food Lab (Kenji López-Alt), p.595. A parsley-sage-rosemary herb-butter paste rubbed under the skin of a whole roast chicken. Roast over halved potatoes for a one-pan carb.
recipeIngredient: 1.5 lb Yukon Gold potatoes, halved (roast under the chicken)
recipeInstructions: Process the parsley, sage, rosemary, scallion, garlic, salt, pepper, lemon zest, and butter into a paste.
Separate the skin from the breasts and rub the paste all over and under the skin; dry-brine uncovered overnight for crisp skin.
Roast per the Simple Whole Roast Chicken recipe (p.594).
